requirement_topic.en: ICE / ARESEP Grid Connection for BESS — 60 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Distributor Interconnection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: ICE / ARESEP BESS并网——60 Hz系统、IEC 62933及配电商互联要求
requirement_topic.zht: ICE / ARESEP BESS併網——60 Hz系統、IEC 62933及配電商互聯要求

summary.en: Costa Rica's electricity sector is governed by the Autoridad Reguladora de los Servicios Públicos (ARESEP), which sets tariffs and technical quality standards under Law No. 7593 (Ley de la Autoridad Reguladora). The generation and transmission system is operated principally by the Instituto Costarricense de Electricidad (ICE); distribution is served by ICE and five regional distributors — Compañía Nacional de Fuerza y Luz (CNFL), Coopeguanacaste, Cooperelesca, JASEC, and ESPH. Grid-connected BESS installations require interconnection approval from the relevant distribution or transmission system operator. Costa Rica's grid operates at 60 Hz (nominal 120 V single-phase, 240 V split-phase residential; 120/208 V and 277/480 V three-phase commercial/industrial), following North American conventions — fundamentally different from China's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — validated for China's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid must be reconfigured for 60 Hz operation, 120/240 V and 120/208 V or 277/480 V voltage levels, and appropriate protection relay settings before interconnection testing in Costa Rica. No publicly accessible ARESEP or ICE technical specification document specifically for utility-scale BESS grid connection had been confirmed as of the dataset date; interconnection technical requirements must be obtained directly from the relevant system operator.
summary.zh: 哥斯达黎加电力行业由公共服务监管局（ARESEP）依据第7593号法律（公共服务监管局法）进行管控，负责制定关税和技术质量标准。发输电系统主要由哥斯达黎加电力研究所（ICE）运营；配电由ICE及五家区域配电商承担——国家电力和照明公司（CNFL）、Coopeguanacaste、Cooperelesca、JASEC和ESPH。并网BESS装置须取得相关配电或输电系统运营商的互联审批。哥斯达黎加电网运行参数为60 Hz（额定住宅单相120 V、分相240 V；商业/工业三相120/208 V和277/480 V），遵循北美惯例——与中国50 Hz、220/380 V电网有本质差异。针对中国50 Hz、220/380 V电网验证的BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——须在哥斯达黎加互联测试前重新配置为60 Hz运行、120/240 V及120/208 V或277/480 V电压等级及相应保护继电器设定。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认ARESEP或ICE公开发布专门针对公用事业规模BESS并网的技术规格文件；互联技术要求须直接向相关系统运营商获取。
summary.zht: 哥斯大黎加電力行業由公共服務監管局（ARESEP）依據第7593號法律（公共服務監管局法）進行管控，負責制定關稅和技術質量標準。發輸電系統主要由哥斯大黎加電力研究所（ICE）運營；配電由ICE及五家區域配電商承擔——國家電力和照明公司（CNFL）、Coopeguanacaste、Cooperelesca、JASEC和ESPH。併網BESS裝置須取得相關配電或輸電系統運營商的互聯審批。哥斯大黎加電網運行參數為60 Hz（額定住宅單相120 V、分相240 V；商業/工業三相120/208 V和277/480 V），遵循北美慣例——與中國50 Hz、220/380 V電網有本質差異。針對中國50 Hz、220/380 V電網驗證的BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——須在哥斯大黎加互聯測試前重新配置為60 Hz運行、120/240 V及120/208 V或277/480 V電壓等級及相應保護繼電器設定。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認ARESEP或ICE公開發布專門針對公用事業規模BESS併網的技術規格文件；互聯技術要求須直接向相關系統運營商獲取。

standards_or_laws: Ley No. 7593 — Ley de la Autoridad Reguladora de los Servicios Públicos (ARESEP enabling law setting Costa Rica electricity technical quality and tariff framework)

ARESEP technical quality regulations — AR-NTCEN (Normas Técnicas de Calidad de Energía No Convencional) and related norms for distributed and storage interconnection (verify current version directly with ARESEP)
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected in project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected in project specifications)
Costa Rica grid parameters: 60 Hz, 120 V single-phase / 240 V split-phase (residential), 120/208 V and 277/480 V three-phase (commercial/industrial) — North American convention

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase). Costa Rica operates at 60 Hz with 120/240 V (residential) and 120/208 V or 277/480 V (commercial/industrial). These are fundamentally different electrical parameters: both frequency and voltage must be addressed. PCS firmware, protection relay settings, frequency ride-through thresholds, and voltage trip parameters configured for China's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid must be completely reconfigured, retested, and recommissioned for Costa Rica's 60 Hz grid before interconnection testing.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）。哥斯达黎加采用60 Hz，住宅120/240 V、商业/工业120/208 V或277/480 V。上述电气参数存在本质差异：频率和电压均须解决。针对中国50 Hz、220/380 V电网配置的PCS固件、保护继电器设定、频率穿越阈值及电压跳闸参数，须在哥斯达黎加互联测试前针对其60 Hz电网进行全面重新配置、重新测试和重新调试。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）。哥斯大黎加採用60 Hz，住宅120/240 V、商業/工業120/208 V或277/480 V。上述電氣參數存在本質差異：頻率和電壓均須解決。針對中國50 Hz、220/380 V電網配置的PCS韌體、保護繼電器設定、頻率穿越閾值及電壓跳閘參數，須在哥斯大黎加互聯測試前針對其60 Hz電網進行全面重新配置、重新測試和重新調試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy ARESEP/ICE/distributor interconnection requirements in Costa Rica. The frequency difference alone (50 Hz China vs 60 Hz Costa Rica) requires PCS redesign or reconfiguration; voltage levels also differ materially. Key actions: (a) PCS firmware and hardware — confirm the PCS can be field-reconfigured for 60 Hz operation and the required voltage levels, or whether a 60 Hz-rated variant must be procured; all relevant protection relay settings, anti-islanding parameters, and frequency trip thresholds must be updated and retested; (b) interconnection agreement — engage ARESEP, ICE, or the relevant regional distributor (CNFL, Coopeguanacaste, Cooperelesca, JASEC, ESPH) at the earliest project stage to obtain current interconnection technical requirements and application procedures; (c) IEC 62933 — where project or utility specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare documentation accordingly, as Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) SCADA / communication protocol — confirm the interface protocol required by ICE or the relevant distributor for BESS monitoring and dispatch.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足哥斯达黎加ARESEP/ICE/配电商互联要求。仅频率差异（中国50 Hz vs 哥斯达黎加60 Hz）就需要对PCS进行重新设计或重新配置；电压等级亦存在实质差异。主要行动：（a）PCS固件和硬件——确认PCS能否在现场重新配置为60 Hz运行及所需电压等级，或是否须采购60 Hz额定版本；所有相关保护继电器设定、防孤岛参数及频率跳闸阈值须更新并重新测试；（b）互联协议——在项目最早阶段与ARESEP、ICE或相关区域配电商（CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、Cooperelesca、JASEC、ESPH）接触，获取现行互联技术要求和申请程序；（c）IEC 62933——若项目或电力公司规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备文件，中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）SCADA/通信协议——确认ICE或相关配电商对BESS监控和调度所要求的接口协议。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足哥斯大黎加ARESEP/ICE/配電商互聯要求。僅頻率差異（中國50 Hz vs 哥斯大黎加60 Hz）就需要對PCS進行重新設計或重新配置；電壓等級亦存在實質差異。主要行動：（a）PCS韌體和硬件——確認PCS能否在現場重新配置為60 Hz運行及所需電壓等級，或是否須採購60 Hz額定版本；所有相關保護繼電器設定、防孤島參數及頻率跳閘閾值須更新並重新測試；（b）互聯協議——在項目最早階段與ARESEP、ICE或相關區域配電商（CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、Cooperelesca、JASEC、ESPH）接觸，獲取現行互聯技術要求和申請程序；（c）IEC 62933——若項目或電力公司規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備文件，中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）SCADA/通訊協議——確認ICE或相關配電商對BESS監控和調度所要求的接口協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARESEP/ICE or regional distributor interconnection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Costa Rica; technical requirements are project-specific and must be obtained directly from the relevant system operator
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Costa Rica

source.publisher: Autoridad Reguladora de los Servicios Públicos (ARESEP) — Costa Rica public services regulator

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Costa Rica's ARESEP/ICE interconnection requirements. The PCS must be reconfigured and retested for Costa Rica's 60 Hz grid at 120/240 V (residential) or 120/208 V / 277/480 V (commercial/industrial) — both frequency and voltage levels differ materially from China's 50 Hz, 220/380 V grid. Engage ARESEP and the relevant system operator (ICE or regional distributor) at the earliest project stage to determine interconnection technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and monitoring protocol specifications. No publicly accessible ARESEP or ICE technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct engagement with the relevant operator is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足哥斯达黎加ARESEP/ICE互联要求。PCS须针对哥斯达黎加60 Hz电网（住宅120/240 V或商业/工业120/208 V / 277/480 V）进行重新配置和重新测试——频率和电压等级均与中国50 Hz、220/380 V电网存在实质差异。应在项目最早阶段与ARESEP及相关系统运营商（ICE或区域配电商）接触，确定互联技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据及监控协议规格。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认ARESEP或ICE公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与相关运营商接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足哥斯大黎加ARESEP/ICE互聯要求。PCS須針對哥斯大黎加60 Hz電網（住宅120/240 V或商業/工業120/208 V / 277/480 V）進行重新配置和重新測試——頻率和電壓等級均與中國50 Hz、220/380 V電網存在實質差異。應在項目最早階段與ARESEP及相關系統運營商（ICE或區域配電商）接觸，確定互聯技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據及監控協議規格。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認ARESEP或ICE公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與相關運營商接觸至關重要。
